# Prasad's Dental Clinic

> Premium cosmetic, general and restorative dental clinic in Pattabipuram, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, India.

## About
Prasad's Dental Clinic is a modern dental practice led by Dr. Prasad, offering comprehensive dental services including cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, teeth whitening, veneers, root canals, orthodontics, and pediatric dentistry. Located in Stambalagaruvu, Pattabipuram, Guntur-522006.

## Services
- Full Mouth Rehabilitation
- Dental Implants
- Bone Grafting and Sinus Lift
- Dentures
- Dental Crowns and Bridges
- Sedation Dentistry
- Dentistry For Kids (Paediatric)
- Porcelain Veneers
- Invisible Aligners
- Braces (Clear)
- Teeth Cleaning and Polishing
- Laser Gum Treatments
- Painless Root Canals
- Wisdom Tooth Extractions
- Cavity Fillings
- Instant Teeth Whitening
- Tooth Bondings
